name: KEYCORP /NEW/
summary: KeyCorp is a financial holding company that grants equity compensation to employees through Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) awards under its Amended and Restated 2019 Equity Compensation Plan. The provided filing excerpt is an RSU Award Agreement detailing vesting schedules, dividend equivalents, tax withholding, clawback provisions, and termination conditions rather than a general business description.

products.name: Restricted Stock Unit Award
products.description: Equity compensation awards granting contingent rights to receive KeyCorp Common Shares upon vesting under the 2019 Equity Compensation Plan.
